name: pylon
description: Reads and writes the documented Pylon REST API surface through concrete streams and write actions.

risk.read: external Pylon API read of support issues, accounts, contacts, users, and messages
risk.write: external Pylon API mutations for support, account, knowledge-base, project, task, tag, survey, and training-data records; approval required
risk.approval: writes require explicit operator approval; delete/redact/merge actions are destructive
